records.question: Which third-party companies have maintenance engineers whose last name is exactly Hirthe?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id
WHERE maintenance_engineers.last_name = 'Hirthe'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1
JOIN Maintenance_Engineers AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id
WHERE T2.last_name = 'Hirthe'

records.question: What third party companies located at 51515 Conn Corner Suite 696 supply assets with model 08 yy and details system1 that were acquired exactly on 2017-12-20 14:05:17?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON assets.maintenance_contract_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_id
WHERE assets.asset_acquired_date = '2017-12-20 14:05:17' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '51515 Conn Corner Suite 696' AND assets.asset_model = '08 yy' AND assets.asset_details = 'system1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1
JOIN Assets AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.supplier_company_id
WHERE T2.asset_model = '08 yy' AND T2.asset_details = 'system1' AND T2.asset_acquired_date = '2017-12-20 14:05:17'

records.question: Which third party companies based in Egypt have assets acquired on or after 2017-10-24 04:29:17 and have a maintenance engineer named Cullen Kunde?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id
WHERE assets.asset_acquired_date >= '2017-10-24 04:29:17' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Egypt' AND maintenance_engineers.last_name = 'Kunde' AND maintenance_engineers.first_name = 'Cullen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1
JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN Assets AS T3 ON T2.maintenance_contract_id = T3.maintenance_contract_id
JOIN Engineer_Visits AS T4 ON T3.asset_id = T4.asset_id
JOIN Maintenance_Engineers AS T5 ON T4.engineer_id = T5.engineer_id
WHERE T1.company_address LIKE '%Egypt%'
  AND T3.asset_acquired_date >= '2017-10-24 04:29:17'
  AND T5.first_name = 'Cullen' AND T5.last_name = 'Kunde'

records.question: Which maintenance contractor named Kuvalis, Boehm and Hettinger has maintenance contracts ending on or before 2018-03-20 14:02:54, employs an engineer with last name Goldner, and supplies assets acquired exactly on 2017-12-18 19:21:11 and disposed exactly on 2018-02-27 02:37:16?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id
WHERE third_party_companies.company_name = 'Kuvalis, Boehm and Hettinger' AND third_party_companies.company_type = 'Maintenance Contractor' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date <= '2018-03-20 14:02:54' AND maintenance_engineers.last_name = 'Goldner' AND assets.asset_acquired_date = '2017-12-18 19:21:11' AND assets.asset_disposed_date = '2018-02-27 02:37:16'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1
JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN Assets AS T3 ON T2.maintenance_contract_id = T3.maintenance_contract_id
JOIN Maintenance_Engineers AS T4 ON T3.supplier_company_id = T4.company_id
WHERE T1.company_name IN ('Kuvalis', 'Boehm', 'Hettinger')
  AND T2.contract_end_date <= '2018-03-20 14:02:54'
  AND T4.last_name = 'Goldner'
  AND T3.asset_acquired_date = '2017-12-18 19:21:11'
  AND T3.asset_disposed_date = '2018-02-27 02:37:16'

records.question: What suppliers named Greenholt-D'Amore from Slovenia have maintenance contracts that started exactly on 2018-01-24 00:06:30 and ended on or before 2018-03-02 16:12:23?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
WHERE third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier' AND third_party_companies.company_name = 'Greenholt-D''Amore' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Slovenia' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date <= '2018-03-02 16:12:23' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_start_date = '2018-01-24 00:06:30'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1
JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.maintenance_contract_company_id
WHERE T1.company_name = 'Greenholt-D''Amore' AND T1.company_address LIKE '%Slovenia%'
  AND T2.contract_start_date = '2018-01-24 00:06:30' AND T2.contract_end_date <= '2018-03-02 16:12:23'
